infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Whiskey Vault uses the camera to scan bottle barcodes for your inventory.

plugins.cameraPermission: Whiskey Vault uses the camera to scan bottle barcodes for your inventory.

plugins.userTrackingPermission: This lets Whiskey Vault share anonymized usage statistics with partners. Your collection, name, and email are never shared.

plugins.photosPermission: Whiskey Vault uses your photos so you can bulk-add bottles from a picture of your shelf.
plugins.cameraPermission: Whiskey Vault uses the camera to photograph your shelf for bulk adding.
